step_by_step_thinking:
Tool Call: retrieve("most common site of esophageal carcinoma and incidence by anatomical region")

Retrieved Documents: 32 documents

First state if you agree/disagree with prior conclusions. Then write at most 2 sentences explaining why, adding one new reason. Finish with your selected option in box notation.
\boxed{}
I agree with the prior conclusion that the most common site of esophageal carcinoma is the lower two-thirds of the esophagus, particularly in Western countries where adenocarcinoma—a type increasingly dominant due to GERD and Barrett’s esophagus—is concentrated in the distal esophagus and gastroesophageal junction. Even though squamous cell carcinoma historically affects the upper and middle esophagus, global shifts show adenocarcinoma now surpasses it in incidence in developed nations, making the lower third the predominant site overall.
